case_title: IVAN LUNA RICO VS. REYES FRANCISCO LEON

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF RICO, IVAN LUNA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $4,800.00 FILED BY LEON, REYES FRANCISCO AKA " JOSE FRANCISCO LEON " AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT RICO, IVAN LUNA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-04-2015 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-04-2015 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $75.00 - SERVED OCT-28-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LEON, REYES FRANCISCO AKA " JOSE FRANCISCO LEON "

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RICO, IVAN LUNA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEON, REYES FRANCISCO AKA " JOSE FRANCISCO LEON " $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,000.00, IN LIEU OF PAYMENT AND AT THE ELECTION OF THE DEFENDANT, DEFENDANT MAY NOT LATER THAN JANUARY 29, 2016, PERMIT PLAINTIFF TO PICK UP HIS BELONGINGS LOCATED AT 2966--24TH STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00 WAIVER);REMARKS: THIS SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE DEFENDANT WAS NOT FOUND. FILED BY PLAINTIFF RICO, IVAN LUNA AS TO DEFENDANT LEON, REYES FRANCISCO AKA " JOSE FRANCISCO LEON "

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT LEON, REYES FRANCISCO AKA " JOSE FRANCISCO LEON " RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT RICO, IVAN LUNA $4,800.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,850.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-04-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-04-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---CARLA CUEVAS. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---MANTI HENRIQUEZ. BOTH INTERPRETER'S IDENTIFICATION HAS BEEN VERIFIED, VIA EMPLOYEE BADGE OR OTHER DOCUMENTATION PROVING CERTIFICATION OR REGISTRATION AND PHOTO IDENTIFICATION. BOTH INTERPRETER HAS AN OATH ON FILE WITH THE COURT. DEFENDANT WAIVES UNTIMELY PROOF OF SERVICE. CROSS--DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO COSTS ON THE PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM---IFP FILED BY PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY RICO, IVAN LUNA AS TO DEFENDANT LEON, REYES FRANCISCO AKA " JOSE FRANCISCO LEON " ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-23-2015 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF JOSE FRANCISCO LEON RE: INCORRECT NAME FOR DEFENDANT FILED BY DEFENDANT LEON, REYES FRANCISCO AKA " JOSE FRANCISCO LEON "

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-04-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-04-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---CARLA CUEVAS. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---MANTI HENRIQUEZ. BOTH INTERPRETER'S IDENTIFICATION HAS BEEN VERIFIED, VIA EMPLOYEE BADGE OR OTHER DOCUMENTATION PROVING CERTIFICATION OR REGISTRATION AND PHOTO IDENTIFICATION. BOTH INTERPRETER HAS AN OATH ON FILE WITH THE COURT. DEFENDANT WAIVES UNTIMELY PROOF OF SERVICE. CROSS--DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO COSTS ON THE PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM---IFP FILED BY PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-23-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-04-2015 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-04-2015 - JUDGMENT.
